phase: Phase 4 — provider write tools + guardrail bridge
designDecision: The engine write actions already own the atomic guardrail sequence (resolveWriteGate -> reserveGuardedAction -> dispatch -> finalizeGuardedAction, plus resolveConfirmationGate/enforceBulkCap/checkAndRecordAction). guardrail-bridge therefore does NOT re-reserve (that would double-count rate + idempotency and break atomicity). It maps tool params to engine opts (dryRun default TRUE, interactive:false so bulk needs host confirmation) and classifies the engine result envelope. The engine action is the single dispatch path.

adversarialCases.scenario: call a read action (getUser) through cloak_provider_write

adversarialCases.expected: dry-run status; page.goto NEVER called (no write)

adversarialCases.scenario: duplicate + concurrent guarded reservations with the same idempotency key
adversarialCases.expected: second is never reserved; exactly one concurrent reservation admitted (no double dispatch)
adversarialCases.evidence: phase4.contract.test.mjs + engine guardrails.test.mjs (atomic guarded reservations under concurrency)

adversarialCases.expected: needs-confirmation (server is interactive:false; confirmed alone insufficient)
adversarialCases.evidence: classifyWriteResult mapping + engine guardrails.test.mjs (confirmation gate cannot be satisfied non-interactively; bulk cap rejects oversized)

adversarialCases.expected: needs-confirmation (host-only); no cleartext secret path exists

regressions: none — full mcp suite (40) green; engine guardrails.test.mjs (16) unaffected.
